data.body:
Implemented (T3 / 2.2+2.4):
- NEW src/rebar/llm/eval_solver.py: run_case(prompt_id, case, runner) stands up a disposable per-case git+rebar store (init_repo) + fixture repo, seeds the synthetic ticket/epics + fixture files, and runs the REAL agentic op (verify_completion / review_ticket / scan_epics_for_spec) via its existing repo_root+runner seams. No production-op changes; the live agent's own show_ticket/file tools read the same disposable store. Resolves the plan-review ambiguity (fixture-backed real store, not mocks); missing fixture files => citations downgrade via findings.resolve_citations (T5b non-happy path).
- completion-verifier.eval.yaml: added per-case  fixtures (fail cases ship code that fails an AC item; pass cases ship code that meets it); fed ticket_context never names the answer. Replaced the graph-dependent case with a single-ticket CV-missing-test case (solver seeds one ticket). gold_set path aligned to fixtures. Labels provisional pending adjudication (per README.plan-review.md).
- tests/unit/test_eval_solver.py (6 tests): all 3 reviewers run offline via FakeRunner and their output is scorable by the registry; fixture files land; unknown prompt raises.
State: spec strict-clean; solver smoke runs a fixture case (verdict FAIL); ruff+mypy clean; eval suites green.
